race.comment: YES I BELIEVE (10) is a four-year-old gelding who is having his first run for the Malcolm Mackenzie stable. Resumes after finishing seventh at Strathalbyn at his last run three-and-a-half months ago. Hasn't trialled publicly but looks nicely placed. Can kick off with a win. MYSTERY MINUTE (4) went forward and gave a great sight before finishing second when resuming last time out over 1200m at this track. Suitably placed so anticipating another big run. STRYKER'S GAL (6) settled well back and never threatened when sixth over 1000m at this track last start after an eye-catching first-up effort at Geraldton. Can improve sharply third-up. UNDERCOVER SNIPER (3) turned in a much better effort last time out to score by 0.7 lengths over 1200m at this track. Likely to be there at the finish again.
